common.error: ❌ There was an error executing that command.

setup.success: ✅ Setup complete: Roles and channels created successfully.

unlink.not_found: ❌ That emoji is not linked to any role.

panel.no_roles: ⚠️ No roles linked. Use `/link` or `!link <emoji> <@role>` first.
panel.header: 🎭 **Pick your side! React to this message to get your role:**

welcome.channel_usage: ⚠️ You must mention a channel. Example: `!welcome channel #general`
welcome.channel_success: ✅ Welcome messages will now be sent in {channel}.
welcome.message_usage:
⚠️ Write a message. Use `{user}` where you want to mention the user.
Example: `!welcome message Hey {user}, pick your side in #roles!`
welcome.image_usage:
⚠️ You must provide a valid URL.
Example: `!welcome image https://example.com/banner.gif`
welcome.test_no_channel: ⚠️ No channel configured. Use `/welcome channel` or `!welcome channel #channel` first.
welcome.test_success: ✅ Simulating new member entry... Check the welcome channel.

help.title: 📚 Bot Help Panel
help.description:
Here's the list of available commands. You can use both `/command` and `!command`.
*Note: All commands require Administrator permissions (except /help).*
help.general_value:
`/setup` ➔ Automatically creates base roles and voice channels.
`/help` ➔ Shows this help panel.
`/language <es/en>` ➔ Change the bot's language.
help.roles_value:
`/link <emoji> <@role>` ➔ Saves which emoji gives which role.
`/unlink <emoji>` ➔ Removes an emoji from the database.
`/panel` ➔ Generates the interactive role selection message.
help.welcome_value:
`/welcome channel <#channel>` ➔ Set the welcome channel.
`/welcome message <text>` ➔ Change the text (`{user}` to mention).
`/welcome image <URL>` ➔ Add a banner.
`/welcome color <#HEX>` ➔ Change the embed color.
`/welcome view` ➔ Show current configuration.
`/welcome test` ➔ Simulate a member entry.
`/welcome reset` ➔ Clear all welcome configuration.
